# unifi_acl_rule (Data Source)

Look up a UniFi ACL rule by `id` or `name` within a site.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Look up an existing ACL rule by name.
data "unifi_site" "main" {
  name = "Default"
}

data "unifi_acl_rule" "block_iot_dns" {
  site_id = data.unifi_site.main.id
  name    = "block-iot-dns"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `site_id` (String)

### Optional

- `name` (String)

- `action` (String)
- `description` (String)
- `destination_ip_filter` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--destination_ip_filter))
- `destination_mac_filter` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--destination_mac_filter))
- `enabled` (Boolean)
- `enforcing_device_ids` (Set of String)
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `index` (Number)
- `network_id_filter` (String)
- `protocol_filter` (Set of String)
- `source_ip_filter` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--source_ip_filter))
- `source_mac_filter` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--source_mac_filter))
- `type` (String)
